name: Spawn Protocol
description: Autonomous DAO governance agent swarm. A parent AI agent spawns, funds, monitors, and terminates child governance agents. Each child autonomously votes on DAO proposals using private reasoning via Venice AI (E2EE, zero data retention), encrypted rationale via Lit Protocol, and onchain execution. The parent evaluates alignment every 90s, writes ERC-8004 receipts, stores Filecoin-backed termination memory, and can run a deterministic judge-flow lifecycle.

agents.name: Spawn Parent Agent
agents.description: Spawns child agents, evaluates alignment via Venice AI, terminates misaligned children, respawns replacements with Filecoin-backed lineage memory, and can run the canonical judge flow. Manages ENS labels, ERC-8004 identities across all 3 registries, MetaMask ERC-7715 delegations, and a live compute/budget policy that can throttle proposal creation or pause non-essential loops.

agent_loops.planning: Read owner governance values from ParentTreasury, enumerate active children from SpawnFactory, resolve ENS labels, fetch voting histories, and poll judge-flow control state when enabled
agent_loops.execution: Spawn children via SpawnFactory EIP-1167 clones, fund child wallets, register ENS labels, create ERC-8004 identities, issue ERC-7715 scoped delegations, and seed judge-marked proof proposals when judge mode is requested
agent_loops.verification: Evaluate each child's voting record against owner values via Venice AI (0-100 alignment score), write score to ChildGovernor.updateAlignmentScore(), submit feedback to ReputationRegistry, emit ValidationRegistry receipts for vote and alignment verification, and require Filecoin termination receipts in judge mode
agent_loops.decision: If alignment < 40 for 2 cycles: terminate (revoke delegation, recall onchain, generate post-mortem, store Filecoin termination report, optionally mirror lineage CID to ENS text records), respawn with lineage memory injected as Venice system context. If runtime budget thresholds are crossed: throttle proposal creation or pause non-essential loops.

agents.name: Spawn Child Agent
agents.description: One process per DAO. Reads active proposals, reasons privately via Venice AI (E2EE), encrypts rationale via Lit Protocol with time-lock access control, casts vote onchain via ERC-7715 scoped delegation, reveals rationale after voting ends, and can inherit predecessor termination reports as lineage memory.

agent_loops.planning: Fetch active proposals from assigned governance contract, filter unvoted proposals, ignore judge proposals that belong to other runs, and load lineage memory from predecessor Filecoin-backed reports
agent_loops.execution: Summarize proposal via Venice, assess risk via Venice, reason FOR/AGAINST/ABSTAIN via Venice with owner values + lineage context, encrypt reasoning via Lit Protocol (time-locked), cast vote onchain
agent_loops.verification: After voting period ends: decrypt rationale via Lit Protocol (time condition met), call revealRationale() onchain, verify keccak256 hash matches committed pre-vote hash
agent_loops.decision: Skip vote if Venice unavailable (no fallback reasoning). Inherit predecessor lessons if lineage memory available.

identity.description: Agent identity tokens (ERC-721). Parent #2220, children #2221-#2223+. Updated with live stats on each cycle.

reputation.description: Parent submits feedback for each child after every alignment evaluation. Score 0-100, tagged by outcome (aligned/drifting/misaligned/terminated). Terminations write score=0.

validation.description: Parent requests validation of each child's voting record, then responds as validator. Creates a two-step onchain proof: request (content hash of vote digest) + response (score + approved). In the canonical judge flow this path is best-effort and surfaced when available.

reasoning.note: E2EE activated via model ID prefix (e2ee-), not a flag. Venice is the ONLY inference backend — remove it and the swarm is braindead.
reasoning.reasoningHashCommitment: keccak256 of Venice output committed onchain before vote, revealed post-deadline via Lit Protocol
reasoning.usageTracking: tokens counted per call, logged per cycle in agent_log.json, and used by the runtime budget controller to throttle or pause non-essential loops
callTypes: summarizeProposal — extract key points before voting
generateSwarmReport — narrative status report per cycle

encryption.purpose: Vote rationale encrypted before vote, decryptable only after voting period ends. Prevents front-running and social pressure attacks.

delegations.scope: castVote only — children cannot transfer funds, change settings, or call any other function
delegations.lifecycle: create on spawn → scope to ChildGovernor.castVote → revoke on termination

onchain_verifiability.description: Every important agent action produces a verifiable receipt. Judges can inspect BaseScan for onchain activity and Filscan for Filecoin-backed termination memory.

example_transactions.child_spawn: SpawnFactory.spawnChild() — EIP-1167 clone deployed per child
example_transactions.vote_cast: ChildGovernor.castVote() — every vote is an onchain tx
example_transactions.alignment_update: ChildGovernor.updateAlignmentScore() — parent writes score per eval
example_transactions.lineage_memory: Filecoin termination report piece CID on Filscan, optionally mirrored into ENS text records and ERC-8004 metadata for dashboard retrieval
